series_metadata.series_description: copy of all eligibility records including but not limited to DD2014, standards of conduct forms, verification of training attendance, exam results, and accreditation documents from the United States Department of Veterans Affairs

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 5 years after Commissioner/Officer resignation, termination, death, or, for commissioners only, failing reappointment ; Paper: 5 years after Commissioner/Officer resignation, termination, death, or, for commissioners only, failing reappointment, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
